Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=xanthosine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 7-methylxanthosine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:15025, ChEBI:CHEBI:18107, ChEBI:CHEBI:49310, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.158; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:17434991}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:15026; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:17434991};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of caffeine (PubMed:17401201, PubMed:17434991). Specific for xanthosine (PubMed:17434991). Cannot use xanthosine 5'-monophosphate (XMP) as substrate (PubMed:17434991). Directly produces 7-methylxanthine, and therefore the methyl transfer and nucleoside cleavage may be coupled (PubMed:17434991). Catalyzes the 7-N-methylation of xanthosine, but does not have 1-N- or 3-N-methylation activity (PubMed:17434991). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:17401201, ECO:0000269|PubMed:17434991}.
